question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not explicitly list the main sections of the thesis.

feedback: While the text provides some context and motivation for each section, it could be more detailed in describing what will be covered in each part.

feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be inferred from the text, but it would be clearer if the author explicitly stated how the sections relate to one another and build upon each other.
